description: Customer orders. Status in order_status column. Date in order_date column.

chunks.text:
TABLE: orders

DESCRIPTION: Customer orders. Status in order_status column. Date in order_date column.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: orders, purchases, transactions, sales, customer orders, order history, placed orders

PRIMARY_KEY: order_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: customer_id → customers.customer_id

COLUMNS: order_id, customer_id, order_date, total_amount, payment_method, order_status, shipping_address, shipping_city, shipping_state, shipping_zip

USE_CASES: Order history, sales by period, order status tracking, revenue totals

metadata.text:
TABLE: orders

DESCRIPTION: Customer orders. Status in order_status column. Date in order_date column.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: orders, purchases, transactions, sales, customer orders, order history, placed orders

COLUMNS: order_id, customer_id, order_date, total_amount, payment_method, order_status, shipping_address, shipping_city, shipping_state, shipping_zip

USE_CASES: Order history, sales by period, order status tracking, revenue totals
